layout.shopDetail: Secure customer, credit and payment tracking for your business.

texts.dashboardDescription: Review total customers, credit amount, payment amount, and outstanding balance.
texts.customersDescription: Add, edit, and manage your customers in one place.
texts.reportsDescription: Monthly trends and customer-wise credit and payment summaries for your business.
texts.settingsDescription: View and update your account profile, photos, and shop settings.
texts.noCustomers: No customers found. Add your first customer to get started.
texts.noPayments: No payments recorded yet. Add payment received from customers.
texts.noPaymentsFiltered: No payments found for the selected date range.
texts.noCredits: No credits recorded yet. Add a credit for a customer.
texts.noCreditsFiltered: No credits found for the selected date range.
texts.invalidPhone: Invalid phone number for this customer.
texts.phoneUnavailable: Phone number not available for this customer.

landing.description: A responsive credit management system built with Next.js, Prisma, Tailwind CSS and PostgreSQL.
landing.headline: Manage customers, credits, payments, and outstanding balances.

messages.invalidPhoneNumber: Invalid phone number for this customer.
messages.phoneNumberUnavailable: Phone number not available for this customer.

reports.monthlyCreditDescription: Total credit issued per month (last 12 months).
reports.monthlyPaymentDescription: Total payments received per month (last 12 months).
reports.outstandingBalanceDescription: Running outstanding balance at the end of each month.

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to access LenDen credit management.
auth.registerDescription: Register to start tracking credits and payments.

about.aboutDetail: LenDen is a comprehensive credit and payment management system designed to help businesses track customer credits, manage payments, and maintain accurate records. Built with modern web technologies, it provides a secure, scalable platform for credit management with integrated WhatsApp notifications and detailed reporting capabilities.

help.helpDescription: If you couldn't find the answer you're looking for, feel free to reach out to our support team.
